# tsnet-funnel

The tsnet-funnel server demonstrates how to use tsnet with Funnel.

To use it, generate an auth key from the Tailscale admin panel and run the demo with the key:

	TS_AUTHKEY=<yourkey> go run tsnet-funnel.go
